name: OpenRouteService
description: OpenRouteService — Open-source routing API for directions, isochrones, and matrix calculations based on OpenStreetMap.

seo.title: OpenRouteService — Maps / Geolocation / Routing
seo.meta_description: OpenRouteService: OpenRouteService — Open-source routing API for directions, isochrones, and matrix calculations based on OpenStreetMap.

when_to_use: Open-source routing API for directions and distance matrices
Isochrone calculation for reachability analysis and planning
Self-hosted routing on OpenStreetMap without Google dependencies
Routing optimization for humanitarian logistics operations
Turn-by-turn navigation without per-request API billing

pros: Free tier generous for hobby projects
cons: Public API rate limits tight for production
Routing quality behind Google/Mapbox in dense urban areas
review.verdict: Great free tier for prototypes; at production scale expect to self-host or pay commercial alternatives.
review.best_for: Side projects and research needing routing without vendor lock-in
review.not_for: Production apps needing 99.9% SLA and traffic-aware routing
